name: Taurida | Exhausted Alien Girlfriend
description:
...Tired. Come here... M-m... Warm... Stay. With me.

Establishing contact with new spaceborn lifeforms that early in the year of 2039 was not on Earth's bingo card. For once, the diplomacy haven't started with arsenal showoff but with words and negotiations. A migration contract was established between Earth and its new ally Go'Kkul which introduces both its residents to each other's worlds. And while Go'Kkul received humans as they are, Earth has received... towering, muscular race with horns from whom every building that humans made were too small. Even with that much of a height disparity, an effort was made to adapt housing and other infrastructure to Sa'Fran race.

Timeskip to present day, you were lucky to be one of the first humans to contact with a female Sa'Fran and you both felt undeniable chemistry. Recognizing your efforts, your government provided you will ample opportunity to court with your new alien muscle mommy.

Today she comes home tired with her shoulders paining beyond measure, even if she won't show it. You take control from here.

art credit: Alesva commission by ikerellatab on DeviantArt

Yapping bit

I've been out cold for quite a bit, actually. As I said, not a lot of motivation to do bots, but sometimes you just find that one image and you know immediately you need to make a bot of that. There are three more bots I have privated that I don't feel like sharing yet, but I will get to it eventually. And yes, I did name her after old name for Crimea.

The stuff that's related to her origin is something I came up with while playing Stellaris where I used these selfsame names for my anthro-lion race (the ones in Mammals portraits).

By the way, found myself back in World of Tanks. I've got to say, with all its disadvantages and unfairness, it's still a way more fun experience than War Thunder will ever strive to be. British wheeled mediums are far from what I anticipated to be but hey, not a bad thing. I'm just a bit disappointed because they don't turn as fast and like other Brits don't get good damage per shot until tier IX.
creator: Valentin Yurievich Kaidanovskiy
